Petition For Allowance Of Statutory Attorneys Compensation And Extraordinary Compensation For Attorney And Award Of Fees
Off Calendar Jun-30-2011 Text Ruling

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Continued To Aug-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Myers for Myers Urbatsch. Frank Acuna and Tracy Regli for and with Barbara Simon.

No one received a request for a court call appearance. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the $240,000.00 Bohden claim being treated as a corporate expense, argument in support of fees and spoke of the tax issue. The Parties conferred outside of the courtroom and reviewed the 7 page fax the Court received from Mr. Bohden. Upon returning, the Parties agreed that the statutory fees and extraordinary fees be paid to the Administrator, that the Estate taxes be paid, that the statutory attorney fees be split two thirds to Conservator's counsel and one third to Mr. Meyer's firm and that Mr. Meyer's extraordinary fees be paid as well. In addition, the Parties agreed that the trailing income be applied to the remaining Federal taxes. Counsel is to draft the order with regard to the above. The accounting petition was continued to August 24, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
